banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock applicant: Priya Renata Alvarez, a U.S. citizen who will be 18 or older on election day, registering to vote in California using the EAC National Mail Voter Registration Form. She has moved within California and is registering for the first time from her new San Diego address (Box B previous-address applies), has not changed her name, provides her California driver's license number as her Box 6 ID number, leaves Box 7 (party) and Box 8 (race/ethnicity) blank per California's own instructions (both 'leave blank' for California — Box 7 is a free preference, not required), signs the form herself, and swears the Box 9 oath. All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real applicant's information.

eligibilityOutcome.summary: Eligible to use the National Mail Voter Registration Form: a U.S. citizen who will be 18 or older on election day, registering from a California address (California accepts the federal form and has no State exclusion, unlike ND/WY/NH/WI).

reasons.requirement: Must answer 'Yes' to the citizenship question, or the form should not be completed.
reasons.sourceRef: Form page 4 — 'Are you a citizen of the United States of America?'

reasons.requirement: Must answer 'Yes' to the age question, or the form should not be completed.
reasons.sourceRef: Form page 4 — 'Will you be 18 years old on or before election day?'

reasons.requirement: California is not one of the four States (ND/WY/NH/WI) with a special or excluded process for this form.

fieldsNotApplicable.label: Choice of party
fieldsNotApplicable.reason: Optional field, left blank per applicant preference (California does not require a party declaration to register).

fieldsNotApplicable.reason: California's own instructions for item 8 state 'Leave blank.'

fieldsNotApplicable.reason: Optional; not attached in this scenario (California's driver's-license ID number in Box 6 already provides identity verification).

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (us/eac/voter-registration-national-mail-form). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to the U.S. Election Assistance Commission, the applicant's State election office, or any government system. A human (the applicant) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, sign the physical or printed form themselves (Box 9), and mail or hand-deliver it to the address listed under their State in the source form's State Instructions before this registration is submitted. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
